items.example: compliance_declaration is required for ONE_STEP onboarding

messages: compliance_declaration is required for ONE_STEP onboarding

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The `id` of the entity obtained from [Create Entity](/reference/create-entity).

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts. See [authentication](/reference/authentication#idempotency) for details (UUID).

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's Yuno account (UUID, 36 characters).

yuno_connection_id.description: The pre-configured Banking Connectivity provider connection identifier.

onboarding_type.description: The onboarding workflow type. `ONE_STEP` submits all information at once for provider processing. `PREVIOUSLY_ONBOARDED` generates an internal Yuno ID without contacting the provider.

compliance_declaration.description: Legal agreements accepted by the entity. Required for `ONE_STEP` onboarding.

accepted.description: Whether the terms of service were accepted.

accepted_ip.description: The IP address from which the terms were accepted.

accepted.description: Whether the privacy policy was accepted.

version.description: The version of the privacy policy accepted.

accepted_ip.description: The IP address from which the policy was accepted.

risk_assessment.description: Pre-existing compliance screening results provided by the merchant.

assessed_at.description: The timestamp when the assessment was performed (ISO 8601).

is_pep.description: Whether the entity is a PEP.

position.description: The political role or position, if applicable.

assessed_by.description: The name of the assessor or team.

appears_on_sanctions_list.description: Whether the entity appears on any sanctions list.

sanctions_list_name.description: The name of the sanctions list, if matched.

screened_at.description: The timestamp when the screening was performed (ISO 8601).

source_of_funds.description: AML/KYC information about the source of funds.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the source of funds.
description.example: Primary income from full-time employment as software engineer, supplemented by stock portfolio dividends

documentation.description: KYC/KYB documents. Each item uses a `type` discriminator to determine which sub-object to populate. Supported types: `IDENTITY_DOCUMENT`, `PROOF_OF_ADDRESS`, `BANK_STATEMENT`, `BUSINESS_DOCUMENT`, `TAX_INFORMATION`, `FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT`, `BIOMETRIC_VERIFICATION`, `EMPLOYMENT_INFORMATION`.

identity_document.description: Identity document details. Provide when `type` is `IDENTITY_DOCUMENT`.

front_image.description: The front image of the document.

back_image.description: The back image of the document.

proof_of_address.description: Proof of address details. Provide when `type` is `PROOF_OF_ADDRESS`.

provider_name.description: The utility or service provider name.

account_number.description: The account number with the provider.

verified_address.description: The address shown on the document.

bank_statement.description: Bank statement details. Provide when `type` is `BANK_STATEMENT`.

account_number_last_4.description: Last 4 digits of the account number.

business_document.description: Business document details. Provide when `type` is `BUSINESS_DOCUMENT`.

tax_information.description: Tax information details. Provide when `type` is `TAX_INFORMATION`.

financial_document.description: Financial document details. Provide when `type` is `FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT`.

audited.description: Whether the document has been audited.

biometric_verification.description: Biometric verification details. Provide when `type` is `BIOMETRIC_VERIFICATION`.

employment_information.description: Employment information details. Provide when `type` is `EMPLOYMENT_INFORMATION`.

annual_income.description: The annual income from this employment.

source_of_funds.description: Primary income from full-time employment as software engineer, supplemented by stock portfolio dividends
